notes.title: A Sufi Saint of the Twentieth Century

frontmatter.title: A Sufi Saint of the Twentieth Century
frontmatter.author: Martin Lings (Abu Bakr Siraj al-Din)
frontmatter.description: The definitive biography of Shaykh Ahmad al-Alawi, the master whose method the Karkariya most directly inherits.

frontmatter.title: The Book of Wisdoms (Kitab al-Hikam)
frontmatter.author: Ibn Ata Allah al-Iskandari
frontmatter.description: The most celebrated collection of Sufi aphorisms, by the third master of the Shadhili chain.

notes.title: The Prophet's Heir: The Life of Ali ibn Abi Talib

frontmatter.title: The Prophet's Heir: The Life of Ali ibn Abi Talib
frontmatter.description: Placeholder — a key text in the Karkariya's recommended reading on the early Sufi lineage.

notes.title: On Faqr: The Secret of the Path

frontmatter.title: On Faqr: The Secret of the Path
frontmatter.description: An essay-style teaching from the Shaykh on spiritual poverty as the destination of the Tariqa.

notes.title: On the Wird: Why It Cannot Be Skipped

frontmatter.title: On the Wird: Why It Cannot Be Skipped
frontmatter.description: The Shaykh's teaching on the centrality and non-negotiability of the daily wird.

frontmatter.title: Style Test
frontmatter.description: Test page for rough-notation annotations, sidenotes, and aliases — delete when done.

frontmatter.title: What is the Tariqa?
frontmatter.description: A foundational Q&A in which the Shaykh explains what the Tariqa Karkariya is and is not.

frontmatter.title: Bay'a
frontmatter.description: The act of initiation into the Tariqa — the pledge of allegiance between murid and Shaykh.

frontmatter.title: Faqr
frontmatter.description: Spiritual poverty — the station of total dependence on God and freedom from all but Him.

frontmatter.title: Hadra
frontmatter.description: The collective spiritual gathering of the Tariqa, combining dhikr, poetry, and presence.

frontmatter.title: Ism al-Mufrad
frontmatter.description: The Singular Name — the dhikr of the divine name "Allah" as the heart's sole occupation.

frontmatter.title: Khalwa
frontmatter.description: Spiritual retreat; a period of seclusion undertaken for intensive worship and purification.

frontmatter.title: Muraqqa'
frontmatter.description: Spiritual watchfulness and contemplative meditation; the practice of inner vigilance.

frontmatter.title: Murid
frontmatter.description: The spiritual aspirant who has taken initiation (bay'a) into the Tariqa.

frontmatter.title: Silsila
frontmatter.description: The initiatic chain of transmission connecting the present Shaykh back to the Prophet ﷺ through an unbroken line of masters.

frontmatter.title: Sirr
frontmatter.description: The innermost secret of the heart; the deepest faculty of the human being, where divine disclosure occurs.

frontmatter.title: Siyaha
frontmatter.description: Spiritual wandering or journey; the practice of leaving one's familiar world for the sake of God.

frontmatter.title: Wird
frontmatter.description: The daily litany of the Tariqa Karkariya, recited morning and evening.

frontmatter.title: Zikr
frontmatter.description: The remembrance of God; the central practice of all Sufi orders, taking many forms in the Karkariya.

frontmatter.description: Spiritual watchfulness as a foundational pillar of the Tariqa Karkariya.

frontmatter.title: Seventh Pillar: Sirr
frontmatter.description: The innermost secret as the seventh and culminating pillar of the Tariqa Karkariya.

frontmatter.description: Spiritual wandering as a foundational pillar of the Tariqa Karkariya.

frontmatter.description: The daily litany as a foundational pillar of the Tariqa Karkariya.

frontmatter.description: Core foundational concepts of the Tariqa Karkariya.

notes.title: Episode 1: What is the Tariqa Karkariya?

frontmatter.title: Episode 1: What is the Tariqa Karkariya?
frontmatter.description: An introduction to the Tariqa — its origins, method, and the question of what a Sufi order is in the modern world.

frontmatter.title: Episode 2: The Seven Pillars Explained
frontmatter.description: A deep-dive conversation on the seven foundational practices of the Tariqa Karkariya.

notes.title: Episode 3: The Role of the Shaykh

frontmatter.title: Episode 3: The Role of the Shaykh
frontmatter.description: What does it mean to have a living spiritual guide? A candid discussion on the Shaykh-murid relationship.

frontmatter.title: Abd al-Salam ibn Mashish
frontmatter.description: The Moroccan pole (qutb) and master of Abu al-Hasan al-Shadhili; a pivotal link in the Karkariya silsila.

frontmatter.title: Abu al-Hasan al-Shadhili
frontmatter.description: Founder of the Shadhiliyya order and the central ancestral figure of the Karkariya lineage.

frontmatter.title: Ahmad al-Alawi
frontmatter.description: The Algerian master whose method the Karkariya most directly inherits; a towering figure of 20th-century Islam.

frontmatter.title: Shaykh Mohamed Faouzi al-Karkari
frontmatter.description: The present guide of the Tariqa Karkariya, born 1974 in Fes, Morocco.

frontmatter.title: Origins of the Tariqa Karkariya
frontmatter.description: How the Karkariya emerged from the Shadhili-Alawi lineage in contemporary Morocco.
